title: gazania jurineifolia subsp. scabra
intro: Gazania jurineifolia subsp. scabra, also known as the rough leaved gazania, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae), characterized by its rough, scabrous leaves and vibrant flowers. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Gazania jurineifolia subsp. scabra include its potential in reducing inflammation and treating various skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wound healing and antimicrobial infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and ointments, which can be applied topically or consumed orally for its medicinal properties.
